events.fact: Grandpa starts the session with character Conrad in the world Terra Conrad.
Build: Cooking station constructed over the fire.
Action: Cooked boar meat and neck meat for health and stamina management.
Encounter: Boar killed for leather and meat.
Discovery: Large raspberry patch found and marked on the map.
Discovery: Chest found containing gold and flint arrows.
Discovery: Abandoned village located and marked on the map.
Encounter: First starred creature (one-star boar) defeated.
Discovery: Second Eikthyr altar and the western ocean boundary located.
Discovery: Multiple beehives found in abandoned buildings.
Build: Emergency shelter, campfire, workbench, and bed constructed before nightfall.
Action: Repaired all tools and weapons at the workbench.
Build: Rag trousers crafted and equipped, increasing armor to 2.
Build: Flint axe crafted, providing a damage upgrade over the stone axe.
